recommendations.title: The Cleansing Hour
recommendations.overview: Two millennial entrepreneurs stage elaborate fake exorcisms on social media until one of their girlfriends becomes possessed by a demon.

recommendations.title: Influencer
recommendations.overview: While struggling on a solo backpacking trip in Thailand, social media influencer Madison meets CW, who travels with ease and shows her a more uninhibited way of living. But CW's interest in her takes a darker turn.

recommendations.title: Ride On
recommendations.overview: A washed-up stuntman and his stunt horse become an overnight social media sensation when their real-life fight with debt collectors goes viral.

recommendations.title: Sissy
recommendations.overview: Cecilia is a successful social media influencer living the dream, until she runs into her ex-childhood best friend and is invited away on her bachelorette weekend. Suddenly, Sissy finds herself stuck in a remote cabin with her school bully... and a t

recommendations.title: The Hater
recommendations.overview: A duplicitous young man finds success in the dark world of social media smear tactics — but his virtual vitriol soon has violent real-life consequences.

recommendations.title: Feed
recommendations.overview: A group of social media experts are hired to help an old family business to strive. But they soon find themselves stuck on a tiny island in a lake in which an ancient Swedish witch is said to live.

recommendations.title: Seriously Single
recommendations.overview: While her free-living bestie urges her to embrace singlehood, a commitment-craving social media expert can't stop following the life of a former love.

recommendations.title: #Horror
recommendations.overview: Inspired by actual events, a group of 12 year old girls face a night of horror when the compulsive addiction of an online social media game turns a moment of cyber bullying into a night of insanity.

recommendations.title: Sweat
recommendations.overview: Three days in the life of fitness motivator Sylwia Zając, whose presence on social media has made her a celebrity. Although she has hundreds of thousands of followers, is surrounded by loyal employees and admired by acquaintances, she is looking for

recommendations.title: Infamous
recommendations.overview: Two young lovers rob their way across the southland, posting their exploits to social media, and gaining fame and followers as a result.
